title: Duplicate File Check
summary: Before modifying ANY file, search for duplicates with the same name; modify only the canonical file and delete duplicates.

title: Path Alias Verification
summary: Always verify path aliases in vite.config.js before assuming @feature/x resolves to a given path.

title: Import Existence Check
summary: Never import files that do not exist; validate with npm run build before pushing.

title: Hook Declaration Order
summary: Declare React hooks in order: States → useMemo → useEffect → Handlers. Wrong order causes TDZ ReferenceError.

title: LogForm Dual Return Type
summary: LogForm returns Array when type==='plan' and Object when type==='protocol'. Always check Array.isArray(logData) before processing.

title: Timezone — Local Dates
summary: ALWAYS use parseLocalDate() or new Date(str + 'T00:00:00'). NEVER use new Date('YYYY-MM-DD') — creates UTC midnight = wrong day in GMT-3.

title: Zod Enums in Portuguese
summary: All Zod schema enum values must be in Portuguese. Always export labels for UI display.

title: Dosage in Pills, Not Milligrams
summary: quantity_taken must be in pills (Zod limit: 100), never in milligrams.

title: Operation Order for Doses
summary: Always follow Validate → Record → Decrement for dose registration. Never decrement stock before validating and recording.

title: Daily PDF Adherence Must Count Dose Events
summary: In the clinical PDF daily table, count completed vs expected dose events per day; exclude future scheduledDoses. Do not reuse monthly aggregate totals.

title: Fallback Patient Identity From Email Handle
summary: If no display name, derive PDF patient label from email local-part before falling back to 'Paciente'.

title: Reuse Shared Patient Identity Helpers
summary: Always reuse src/shared/utils/patientUtils.js for patient display fallback. Do not re-implement local helpers.

title: Consultation Summary Must Count Actual Doses Taken
summary: Use dose-count metric (taken) as numerator for taken/expected. Keep takenAnytime only for secondary insights.

title: Callback Data < 64 Bytes
summary: Use numeric indices in callback_data, not UUIDs. Store full mapping in session.

title: MarkdownV2 Escaping
summary: Always use escapeMarkdownV2() for MarkdownV2 messages. Escape backslash FIRST. Do NOT escape answerCallbackQuery text.

title: shouldSendNotification() Includes Logging
summary: shouldSendNotification() calls logNotification() internally. Never call logNotification() explicitly after — causes duplicate logs.

title: Vercel API Rewrites
summary: Always add explicit rewrites in vercel.json for new API routes. Catch-all must be LAST. Use :id syntax for dynamic params.

title: No process.exit() in Serverless
summary: Never use process.exit() in Vercel serverless functions. Use throw new Error() instead.

title: Service Role Authentication
summary: Any endpoint using service_role key (bypasses RLS) MUST have authentication via Supabase Auth + ADMIN_CHAT_ID.

title: JSDoc in Portuguese
summary: All JSDoc comments must be in Portuguese from the first commit.

title: Validate Before Push
summary: Run validate:quick during development; run validate (all tests) before creating a PR.

title: No Self-Merge for Code Agents
summary: Never allow a code agent to merge its own PR. Code creates PR → review → DevOps merges only after explicit approval.

title: Mandatory Review Pause
summary: Always pause for review between coding tasks. Never create sequential tasks without validation gates.

title: Quality Over Speed
summary: One well-reviewed PR is worth more than 3 rushed PRs. Gemini Code Assist review is non-negotiable.

title: Process as Protection
summary: Never skip workflow steps 'just this once'. Process violations compound into production failures.

title: Read Memory Before Coding
summary: Every agent MUST read rules.md and anti-patterns.md BEFORE writing any code.

title: No setTimeout in act() Blocks
summary: Never use setTimeout inside act() to wait for components. Use waitFor(() => expect(...)) instead.

title: Mock External Services in Hook Tests
summary: Hook tests rendering a Provider that calls Supabase/API MUST mock those services with vi.mock() at module level.

title: Always Resolve Dangling Promises
summary: When a test creates a manually-controlled Promise, ALWAYS resolve it in a finally block to prevent Vitest hangs.

title: Use Fake Timers for Timer-Dependent Tests
summary: Use vi.useFakeTimers() and vi.runAllTimersAsync() for deterministic timer control. Always restore in afterEach.

title: Use validate:agent for Agent Sessions
summary: Agents MUST use npm run validate:agent (10-min kill switch). Never use validate:quick or validate:full from agent sessions.

title: Low-RAM Test Compatibility
summary: All tests must pass on 8GB RAM via npm run test:lowram. Split test files >300 lines by scope.

title: Disable localStorage in Tests
summary: Skip localStorage persistence in test env (NODE_ENV === 'test') to save ~200MB memory.

title: Cancel setInterval in Tests
summary: Global setIntervals MUST be cancellable. Export cancelGarbageCollection()/restartGarbageCollection() and call in beforeAll/afterAll.

title: Aggressive Test Cleanup
summary: afterEach must call: clearCache(), vi.clearAllMocks(), vi.clearAllTimers(), optionally global.gc().

title: Split Test Files by Scope
summary: Test files >300 lines must be split by feature/hook/component. Each file tests ONE logical unit.

title: Cache Architecture Optimizations
summary: queryCache OOM fixes (2026-02-23): generation counter, TTL eviction, debounced persistence, LRU reset, stable queriesKey, deduplication.

title: Test Suite Performance Strategy
summary: Choose test command by context: test:fast (dev), test:lowram (8GB), validate:agent (agents — MANDATORY), validate:full (CI).
